title: Sentinel Shield external-adopter session record
description: Evidence produced by tests/adopter/black-box-install.sh: a machine-readable transcript of a first-time external adopter driving the DOCUMENTED install flow (acquire -> verify -> dry-run -> install -> doctor -> local pipeline) from an empty workspace, using only git + curl + documented prerequisites and only published docs (README.md, docs/ai-assisted-install.md). Every command, exit code, elapsed time, generated file and user-facing message is recorded. It carries NO secrets and NO absolute local paths (HOME relativized to '~', the workspace root to '<workspace>', the target to '<target>'). A non-empty undocumented_requirements[] means the flow required an env var or path NOT in the published docs, which is a usability failure (result=fail).

harness.description: Which adopter harness produced the record.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC time the session started.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC time the session finished.

workspace.description: Redacted label for the empty workspace the session ran in (e.g. '<workspace>').

engine_source.description: How the engine was acquired for the session (redacted).

documented_inputs.description: The ONLY inputs the flow was allowed to use: documented env vars and the published docs it followed.

steps.description: Ordered transcript of the flow's steps.

command.description: The exact command run, redacted (no secrets, no absolute paths).

exit_code.description: Process exit code, or null when the step was skipped before running.

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds the command took, or null when skipped.

status.description: ok=ran and produced an acceptable outcome; skip=deliberately not run (explicit reason recorded); fail=required step failed.

message.description: Redacted user-facing message or skip/failure reason. A skip MUST carry an explicit reason (a skip is not a pass).

generated_files.description: Redacted/relativized paths of files the step created.

undocumented_requirements.description: Env vars or paths the flow REQUIRED that are NOT in the published docs. Non-empty => usability failure.

result.description: pass only when every required step is ok (or an explicitly-reasoned skip) and undocumented_requirements is empty.
